name: claude-shot
description: One keystroke: capture a macOS screenshot straight into Claude Code's terminal prompt. No drag-drop, no clipboard juggling.

commands.title: Claude Shot: Capture Region into Claude Code
Claude Shot: Capture Full Screen into Claude Code
Claude Shot: Capture Window into Claude Code

claudeShot.saveDirectory.description: Directory to save screenshots in. Leave empty to use the OS temp directory. Supports ~ for home.

claudeShot.targetTerminalName.description: Only send to a terminal whose name contains this string (case-insensitive). Leave empty to use the active terminal.

claudeShot.focusTerminalAfterCapture.description: Reveal and focus the target terminal after capture so you can type your prompt immediately.

claudeShot.keepFiles.description: Keep screenshot files after the session. When false, files older than 24h in the save directory are pruned on startup.

claudeShot.playSound.description: Play the macOS screenshot shutter sound on capture.
